description.from: Quickly stabs the enemy, dealing 277(1+0.3Skill Level)+160.5% of Attack Power as Physical Damage. On critical hit, applies [Wound] 1 stack and resets the cooldown. For each [Wound] stack, this skill's damage is increased by 20%, and you are immune to all damage while casting.
description.to: Quickly stabs the enemy, dealing 277*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient))+160.5% ATK as Physical DMG. On a Critical Hit, applies [Wound] 1 stack and resets the cooldown. This skill’s DMG is increased by 20% per stack of [Wound].

description.from: Removes your harmful effects and increases Attack by 205(1+0.3Skill Level) and Critical Hit Chance by 600 for 10 sec.
description.to: Removes harmful effects from self and increases ATK by 205*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient)) and Critical Hit Chance by 500 for 15sec.

description.from: Performs a series of attacks, dealing 126(1+0.3Skill Level)+72.3% of Attack Power as Physical Damage 9 times, then finishes with a powerful thrust that deals 1132(1+0.3Skill Level)+651.5% of Attack Power as Physical Damage and knocks the enemy far away.
description.to: Performs a series of attacks, dealing 126*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient))+72.3% ATK Physical Damage 9 times, then finishes with a powerful thrust that deals 1132*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient))651.5% ATK Physical Damage and knocks the enemy far away. The damage of this skill is increased by 20% per [Wound] stack, and all [Wound] stacks are consumed on the final hit.

description.from: On critical hit, increases Attack by 40(1+0.3*Skill Level) for 10 sec. This effect stacks up to 8 times.
description.to: On a Critical Hit, increases ATK by 40*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient)) for 10sec. This effect stacks up to 8 times.

light.from:
Mana cost is increased by 1000, but the maximum number of [Wound Stacks] is increased to 10.
If [Wound Stacks] is 10, deals additional damage equal to 150% of Attack Power.
light.to: Mana cost is increased by 1000, but the maximum number of [Wound Stacks] is increased to 10.

dark.from: Mana cost is increased by 1000, but the Critical Hit Chance increase effect is changed to increase Critical Damage by 120%, and damage dealt to bosses is increased by 30%.
dark.to: Mana cost is increased by 1000, but the Critical Hit Chance increase effect is replaced with an effect that increases Critical Damage by 65%, and damage dealt to bosses is increased by 30%.

dark.from: If there are 5 or more stacks, all damage taken is reduced by 20%.

description.from: [Shooting Star] Increases DMG by {0}% and upon a Crit Hit, recovers Mana by 200.
description.to: [Shooting Star] Increases DMG by {0}%, and adds 1 Wound per attack.

dark.from: When using a skill, has a 10% chance to increase your Critical Damage by 10%. This effect stacks up to 10 times.
dark.to: When using a skill, has a 10% chance to increase your Critical Damage by 7%. This effect stacks up to 10 times.

description.from: Each time a critical hit occurs, for 15 sec your Attack Speed is increased by {0} and Critical Damage is increased by {1}%. This effect stacks up to 5 times.
description.to: Each time a Critical Hit occurs, for 15 sec own Attack Speed is increased by {0} and Critical Damage is increased by {1}%. This effect stacks up to 8 times.
